_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Better Than Wolves CE
author: phantomic12
description:
Better Than Wolves Community Edition server. Minecraft 1.6.4 with Legacy Fabric loader and the official BTWCE mod from Modrinth.
Wiki: https://wiki.btwce.com/view/3.0.0_Beta
Mod: https://modrinth.com/mod/btwce

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Better Than Wolves CE - Pterodactyl Egg Installation Script
# Minecraft 1.6.4 + Legacy Fabric 0.18.0+ + BTWCE 3.1.0+
# Server Files: /mnt/server
#
# This script is idempotent: re-running it on a working install is a no-op.

set -e

apt-get update
apt-get install -y curl jq unzip wget dos2unix

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

# If everything is already in place, exit early.
if [ -f fabric-server-launch.jar ] && ls mods/btwce-*.jar 1>/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "BTWCE already installed - skipping reinstall."
  echo "  Server jar: fabric-server-launch.jar"
  echo "  Mods:"
  ls -la mods/btwce-*.jar
  exit 0
fi

# Step 1: Download the Legacy Fabric installer.
# 1.1.1 is the minimum working version. 0.11.1 has an lwjgl-platform
# artifact-name bug that 404s for MC 1.6.4.
echo "[1/4] Downloading Legacy Fabric Installer 1.1.1..."
curl -sSL --fail -o lf-installer.jar \
  "https://maven.legacyfabric.net/net/legacyfabric/fabric-installer/1.1.1/fabric-installer-1.1.1.jar" \
  || { echo "ERROR: Could not download Legacy Fabric installer from maven.legacyfabric.net"; exit 1; }

# Step 2: Run installer in server mode.
# Note: the wiki says 0.15.x, but BTWCE 3.1.0 actually requires fabricloader >= 0.18.0.
echo "[2/4] Running Legacy Fabric Installer (MC ${MC_VERSION}, loader ${LOADER_VERSION})..."
java -jar lf-installer.jar server -dir . -mcversion "${MC_VERSION}" -loader "${LOADER_VERSION}" -downloadMinecraft

if [ ! -f fabric-server-launch.jar ]; then
  echo ""
  echo "============================================================"
  echo "  ERROR: fabric-server-launch.jar was not produced."
  echo "  Retry: click 'Reinstall Server' in Pelican in a few minutes."
  echo "============================================================"
  echo ""
  echo "Files in /mnt/server:"
  ls -la 2>/dev/null || true
  exit 1
fi

# Step 3: Download the BTWCE mod from Modrinth
mkdir -p mods

if ! ls mods/btwce-*.jar 1>/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "[3/4] Downloading BTWCE ${BTWCE_VERSION} from Modrinth..."

  if [ "${BTWCE_VERSION}" = "latest" ]; then
    BTW_URL=$(curl -sSL --fail "https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/btwce/version" \
      | jq -r '[.[] | select(.version_type == "release")][0].files[0].url' \
      | head -1)
  else
    BTW_URL=$(curl -sSL --fail "https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/btwce/version" \
      | jq -r --arg v "${BTWCE_VERSION}" '.[] | select(.version_number == $v) | .files[0].url' \
      | head -1)
    if [ -z "$BTW_URL" ] || [ "$BTW_URL" = "null" ]; then
      echo "WARN: BTWCE version '${BTWCE_VERSION}' not on Modrinth, falling back to latest release."
      BTW_URL=$(curl -sSL --fail "https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/btwce/version" \
        | jq -r '[.[] | select(.version_type == "release")][0].files[0].url' \
        | head -1)
    fi
  fi

  if [ -z "$BTW_URL" ] || [ "$BTW_URL" = "null" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: Could not determine BTWCE mod download URL from Modrinth."
    exit 1
  fi

  curl -sSL --fail -o mods/btwce-mod.jar "$BTW_URL" \
    || { echo "ERROR: Failed to download BTWCE from $BTW_URL"; exit 1; }
  echo "  -> $BTW_URL"
fi

# Step 4: EULA + default server.properties
echo "[4/4] Finalizing..."
echo "eula=true" > eula.txt

if [ ! -f server.properties ]; then
  cat > server.properties <<'SPROPS'
#Minecraft server properties
level-name=world
server-port=25565
level-seed=
gamemode=survival
max-players=20
motd=BTW CE Server
spawn-protection=16
online-mode=true
white-list=false
level-type=default
difficulty=2
allow-nether=true
spawn-monsters=true
spawn-animals=true
view-distance=10
tick-time=60000
SPROPS
  dos2unix server.properties 2>/dev/null || true
fi

# Clean up installer
rm -f lf-installer.jar

echo ""
echo "====================================="
echo "  BTWCE install complete!"
echo "====================================="
echo "  Minecraft:    ${MC_VERSION}"
echo "  Loader:       Legacy Fabric ${LOADER_VERSION}"
echo "  BTWCE:        ${BTWCE_VERSION}"
echo "  Server jar:   fabric-server-launch.jar"
echo "  Mods:"
ls -la mods/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v '^total' | grep -v '^d' || echo "    (none)"
echo "====================================="

variables.name: Minimum Heap Memory (MB)
variables.description: The minimum amount of RAM in megabytes allocated to the Java Virtual Machine.

variables.name: Maximum Heap Memory (MB)
variables.description: The maximum amount of RAM in megabytes allocated to the Java Virtual Machine.

variables.name: Minecraft Version
variables.description: The Minecraft version to install. BTWCE 3.x requires 1.6.4.

variables.name: BTWCE Version
variables.description: The BTWCE mod version to install (from Modrinth). Use 'latest' for newest release, or pin a specific version like 3.1.0.

variables.name: Legacy Fabric Loader Version
variables.description: The Legacy Fabric loader version. BTWCE 3.1.0 requires 0.18.0 or later.

variables.name: MOTD
variables.description: The message shown in the server list.
variables.default_value: A Better Than Wolves CE Server

variables.name: Online Mode
variables.description: Verify players against Mojang accounts. Set to false to allow cracked/offline clients.
